title: Profiler
description: A Minecraft mod that stores your settings outside of your minecraft instances and lets you restore the settings with the click of a button to any instance
body: Are you tired of every time you load a new modpack or a new minecraft instance with your friends you have to go through so many menus and change all your settings, all your controls, all your volumes? With Profiler now you can change all your settings with the click of one button! What Profiler does is with the click of a button can save your minecraft settings to a json file stored outside of your minecraft instances and saves. Then the mod on any new instance will apply those settings all at once with the click of a button!
